intents.response: Hello! Welcome to **KICKINBANANA** ⚽🏏. How can I help you choose or customize your sports jersey today?
Our premium jerseys generally start at **₹1,299** for cricket jerseys and **₹1,499** for football jerseys. Custom orders with custom name/number printing start at **₹1,699**!
You can design your own jersey directly on our **Custom** page! Choose your colors, pattern, name, and number, then click the order button to send us the design directly on WhatsApp!
We offer Pan-India delivery within **5-7 business days**. Express shipping is also available if you need it within 2-3 days for an upcoming match!

You can connect with us via Instagram [@kickinbanana_11](https://instagram.com/kickinbanana_11), drop us a message on WhatsApp at [+91 98765 43210](https://wa.me/919876543210), or email us at kickinbanana@gmail.com.
We support standard sizes: **S (38")**, **M (40")**, **L (42")**, **XL (44")**, and **XXL (46")**. If you're in between sizes, we recommend sizing up for a relaxed fit.
All KICKINBANANA jerseys are crafted from premium **100% dry-fit polyester**, engineered to keep you dry and comfortable during intense match sessions.

fallback: I'm not fully sure about that, but our team can help! You can check our Collections page, customize a jersey on the Custom page, or message us directly on WhatsApp for instant assistance.
